payload.answer: This looks like the same Slack event delivered twice. I can either treat it as a duplicate and ignore the second copy, or keep both entries separately if you want to preserve the raw event stream.
citations: Input: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans
repair_options: Treat the second delivery as a duplicate and ignore it
Keep both deliveries as separate raw events for audit purposes
Mark it for manual review if you suspect the duplicated event may differ in hidden metadata
